tasks.content: When the status bar is double clicked, the windows doesn’t mazimize smoothly
tasks.title: window maximizing is not smooth.
Hidden terminal tabs get resized to ~10x6, corrupting live sessions
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · terminals] Switching tabs fires the ResizeObserver fit on a display:none host; the pty is resized to ~10x6, a live agent rewraps at 11 cols and scrollback tails are lost permanently.
Expected: skip fit + pty_resize when the host box is zero-sized/hidden.
Where: src/App.tsx:197-199, src/lib/term-sessions.ts:172-179
Source: audit 4 B1

tasks.title: Screenshot thumbnails never render — the loader is dead code
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · kanban] thumbFor (readFileB64 -> data URI) is imported nowhere; cards/composer pass raw repo-relative paths which TaskCard refuses, so the placeholder glyph shows forever.
Expected: route attachment paths through thumbFor.
Where: src/lib/kanban-store.ts:117-130, src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:240,278, src/screens/kanban/TaskCard.tsx:61
Source: audit 4 B2

tasks.title: Cancelling a generating round strands its tasks locked in In progress
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · kanban] fixes_cancel pops the round and nulls task.round but never restores column: queued — tasks render 'locked while it executes' with no strip and no drag-out.
Expected: cancel restores the tasks to Queued.
Where: src-tauri/src/main.rs fixes_cancel
Source: audit 4 B3

tasks.title: A failed generation strands tasks frozen while the toast says they're untouched
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · kanban] settle_round marks the round failed but leaves tasks in_progress + rounded; no strip explains it (executingRound ignores failed) and the failure toast claims 'your tasks are untouched'.
Expected: a failed round releases its tasks back to Queued (round cleared) and the toast tells the truth.
Where: src-tauri/src/main.rs settle_round, src/lib/kanban-store.ts:100, src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:165
Source: audit 4 B4

tasks.title: Round completion is only detected while the right pane is watching
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · kanban] settle_round runs only inside fixes_status, which is polled only by the kanban generating overlay or the mounted RoadmapPane; switch panes mid-generation and there is no resume — the round can stay 'generating' indefinitely.
Expected: the App-level poll (or a store-level poller) checks fixes_status whenever any round is generating, and the kanban pane resumes its overlay on return.
Where: src-tauri/src/main.rs:1090, src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:140-172, src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:181-212
Source: audit 4 B5

tasks.title: 'Ready to execute' counts one set of tasks and executes another
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · kanban] The button counts ALL queued tasks; eligibility and the backend exclude round!=null. A stale rounded task in Queued makes the button enabled-but-no-op, and its count disagrees with the preflight and the rail badge.
Expected: one eligibility rule (queued AND unrounded) everywhere; disable at 0 eligible.
Where: src/screens/kanban/Board.tsx:139 vs src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:190,246
Source: audit 4 B6

tasks.title: Phase detail page cannot scroll — long content is unreachable
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · roadmap] The detail body is overflow-hidden with no scrollable ancestor; steps/docs/saves below the fold are cut off (measured 2602px content in a 700px viewport, zero scrollable ancestors).
Expected: the detail body scrolls like the roadmap column.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/PhaseDetail.tsx:214
Source: audit 2 B1

tasks.title: The misplaced-manifest 'Leave it' button is a permanent dead end
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · roadmap] Mapper precedence: the misplaced branch precedes the basic-view consent branch, so 'Leave it' sets consent but the card re-renders forever (holds across restarts while the file sits in a subfolder).
Expected: 'Leave it' shows the basic-view card.
Where: src/lib/roadmap-data.ts:276 vs :283, src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:293
Source: audit 2 B2

tasks.title: Reload after 'changed on disk' in Diff mode loads Contents under a Diff label
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · repo] onReload unconditionally calls loadContents (onRetry branches on mode correctly); the Diff toggle stays active with a stale +/- stat over a contents body.
Expected: reload respects the active mode.
Where: src/screens/repo/RepoPane.tsx:514
Source: audit 3 B1

tasks.title: A behind-only repo claims 'Everything is published' and hides Bring down
tasks.content:
[P1 · WRONG-INFO · repo] publishStateFrom ignores behind unless ahead>0: with ahead 0 / behind 3 the footer shows the success state and the app's only pull affordance disappears.
Expected: a behind-only state (e.g. 'Up to date locally - Bring down 3 newer').
Where: src/lib/repo-data.ts:195-203
Source: audit 3 W1

tasks.title: Global shortcuts fire inside text fields — Ctrl+W while typing closes the project
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · shell] The keyboard map has no typing guard: Ctrl+W (delete word) in the palette input silently closed the project; Ctrl+K/J/O/T are swallowed in every text field. KanbanPane's cmd-N already has the right guard — the map is inconsistent.
Expected: skip the map when the event target is an input/textarea.
Where: src/App.tsx:306-330 (guard pattern at src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:177)
Source: audit 1 B-1

tasks.title: With 5+ projects the active project can have no tab at all
tasks.content:
[P1 · WRONG-INFO · shell] The tab strip slices the first 4 regardless of which is active; the current project can be invisible with nothing marking it anywhere.
Expected: the active tab is always visible (swap it into the window).
Where: src/components/chrome/TitleBar.tsx:45
Source: audit 1 W-1

tasks.title: Scan-failed card's 'Use the basic view' is an in-session no-op
tasks.content:
[P2 · BROKEN · roadmap] The failed-init branch precedes the consent check and initRun is only cleared on success/cancel/switch; the click persists consent but the card stays until restart.
Where: src/lib/roadmap-data.ts:279-280
Source: audit 2 B3

tasks.title: Session log lines are keyed by content — duplicate keys on repeated lines
tasks.content:
[P2 · BROKEN · sessions] logLinesFrom only collapses consecutive repeats; A,B,A,B tails produce duplicate React keys in BuildingCard and ExecuteFlow (React declares duplication/omission possible).
Expected: index keys.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/BuildingCard.tsx:65, src/screens/kanban/ExecuteFlow.tsx:129
Source: audit 2 B4 + audit 4 I2

tasks.title: Ready-to-save rows keyed by basename — duplicate keys across directories
tasks.content:
[P2 · BROKEN · repo] key={f.name} on a flat list; two staged index.ts files collide (React warning captured).
Expected: key={f.path}.
Where: src/screens/repo/HistoryPane.tsx:375
Source: audit 3 B2

tasks.title: Tree expand/collapse never animates
tasks.content:
[P2 · BROKEN · repo] buildTree returns children: [] when closed and the row only mounts AccBody when children exist — the 0fr/1fr transition never runs in either direction.
Where: src/screens/repo/FileTree.tsx:191-207, src/lib/repo-data.ts:78
Source: audit 3 B3

tasks.title: Frozen cards can't be dragged OUT of the round lane
tasks.content:
[P2 · BROKEN · kanban] The frozen TaskCard branch renders no drag props, contradicting the wiring's own policy ('out of the round is always allowed').
Where: src/screens/kanban/TaskCard.tsx:129-153 vs KanbanPane.tsx:120-122
Source: audit 4 B7

tasks.title: The composer's column control bypasses the In-progress lane block
tasks.content:
[P2 · BROKEN · kanban] Saving a roundless task as In progress puts it in the round-owned lane rendered 'locked while it executes' with no round.
Expected: the composer omits In progress for roundless tasks.
Where: src/screens/kanban/Composer.tsx:77
Source: audit 4 B8

tasks.title: An executing FX round renders as 'Later' with a hollow dot
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · roadmap] FX phases map done/later only — a state:'now' round contradicts the banner (which says Executing) with a collapsed 'Later' card and no pulsing dot.
Expected: FX phases honor now like any phase.
Where: src/lib/roadmap-data.ts:448-450
Source: audit 2 W1

tasks.title: Every non-done phase detail claims step 1 is 'Being worked on'
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · roadmap] i===0 is hardcoded active whenever the phase isn't done — fabricated activity on Later phases and wrong within Now phases.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/PhaseDetailHost.tsx:96-98
Source: audit 2 W2

tasks.title: All-done banner says 'finished and published' while saves wait to publish
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · roadmap] The copy ignores ahead>0 — it can sit directly above 'N saves waiting to publish'.
Where: src/lib/roadmap-data.ts:326
Source: audit 2 W3

tasks.title: Session elapsed resets to 0s on tab switch; the >5min variant downgrades
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · sessions] Rehydration stamps startedAt at re-attach (backend exposes no start time); a 6-minute rebuild shows '3s' and loses the still-running reassurance card. The fixes mirror never reaches the >5min variant at all.
Expected: init_status/fixes_status return the true start time.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:104,130,193, src/lib/roadmap-data.ts:301-312, src-tauri init_status/fixes_status
Source: audit 2 W4 + audit 4 W4

tasks.title: Consent card and rebuild confirm say 'A Claude session' when Codex is selected
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · roadmap] The wiring passes agent=codex correctly; only the copy is wrong.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/ConsentCard.tsx:76-78, src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:318
Source: audit 2 W5

tasks.title: 'Start this phase' helper promises a paste-file copy on phases that have none
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · roadmap] The helper text always claims the copy; the handler just toasts 'Session started' when there's no paste file.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/PhaseDetailHost.tsx:90-92, RoadmapPane.tsx:255-256
Source: audit 2 W6 + audit 4 W6

tasks.title: The round strip names the wrong round and can get stuck open forever
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · kanban] executingRound returns the FIRST open round: while round 2 generates it says 'new tasks start round 2' (they join 3); a task moved back to Queued keeps its round so round 1 never completes and the strip never hides.
Where: src/lib/kanban-store.ts:100-109
Source: audit 4 W1

tasks.title: The board lies for up to 8s around Execute/Cancel
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · kanban] startGenerate and generating-cancel never refreshKanban; behind the overlay the tasks still show Queued and the strip names the old round until the next poll.
Where: src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:131-138,211-215
Source: audit 4 W2

tasks.title: ExecuteFlow copy hardcodes 'Claude Code' when Codex is selected
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · kanban] The flow passes agent and the backend runs Codex; the copy doesn't.
Where: src/screens/kanban/ExecuteFlow.tsx:84,160
Source: audit 4 W3

tasks.title: Grammar: '1 tasks queued' rail aria-label; plural body with singular button on cmd-W confirm
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · shell] Rail badge label doesn't pluralize; the multi-session confirm says '3 sessions are still running' but the button says 'Close and stop the session'.
Where: src/components/chrome/Rail.tsx:95, src/App.tsx:251-253
Source: audit 4 W5

tasks.title: The macOS window title is never set on project open, only on later switches
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · shell] doOpenProject calls activate before the projects map commits, so the name lookup misses and setTitle is skipped; also never reset on Home.
Where: src/App.tsx:146-167
Source: audit 1 W-2

tasks.title: Stale 'Updated' badge after close-fallback activation
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · shell] closeProject promotes the next project via bare setActiveDir which never clears updated/updatedHint.
Expected: route every foregrounding path through activate().
Where: src/App.tsx:240-242
Source: audit 1 W-3

tasks.title: The 'Writing your roadmap' recents card is unreachable from real data
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · shell] picker-data supports opts.writing but App never passes it — during a live build, Home shows 'No roadmap yet' instead.
Where: src/lib/picker-data.ts:40-55, src/App.tsx:369
Source: audit 1 W-4

tasks.title: 'EXPLORER - 5 ROOTS' counts every top-level folder as a root
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · repo] The tree feeds root CHILDREN as roots: wrong count, every top dir gets root styling, top-level changed dirs never get the tint, real workspace roots aren't distinct.
Where: src/screens/repo/FileTree.tsx:213-218, RepoPane.tsx:463-473
Source: audit 3 W2

tasks.title: Huge-file card promises 'click-to-copy still works' but no copy control exists
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · repo] The >1.5MB note claims copyability; the huge card has no button and the bottom Copy bar is code-only.
Expected: wire copy_file on the huge card, or drop the claim.
Where: src/screens/repo/RepoPane.tsx:263, src/screens/repo/Viewer.tsx:293-306
Source: audit 3 W3

tasks.title: Deleted files can't appear in the tree — the dashed-D state and deletion diffs are unreachable
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · repo] list_dir lists disk entries only; a deleted file vanishes from the tree and no path anywhere shows a deletion's diff.
Where: src-tauri/src/main.rs:1458 list_dir, src/screens/repo/FileTree.tsx:115-143
Source: audit 3 W4

Ruling (round 3): by design — the tree shows disk truth and a deleted file has no disk entry (VS Code behaves the same); deletions remain visible with the dashed-D treatment in Project history's changes rows, which is where save/discard decisions happen.

tasks.title: A git-status failure silently reads as 'Nothing to save - everything is recorded'
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · repo] A failed git_status_detail degrades to null and the history pane shows the all-clear note.
Expected: a quiet 'Couldn't check for changes' banner.
Where: src/screens/repo/RepoPane.tsx:171-176, src/screens/repo/HistoryPane.tsx:477-481
Source: audit 3 W5

tasks.title: The generating overlay blocks the whole app by mouse
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · kanban] fixed inset-0 covers the rail and title bar; panes are unreachable except by keyboard while a plan writes.
Expected: a non-modal placement (or at least the rail stays clickable).
Where: src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:323
Source: audit 4 U1

tasks.title: Composer and ExecuteFlow overlays aren't real dialogs
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · kanban] No Escape close, no scrim click, no role=dialog/focus trap (the Radix confirms behave correctly).
Where: src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:271,323
Source: audit 4 U2

tasks.title: Enter in the design-link field does nothing
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · kanban] You must click Add; closing also drops the draft silently.
Where: src/screens/kanban/Composer.tsx:191-201
Source: audit 4 U3

tasks.title: Attachment files are orphaned on cancel/remove/delete
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · kanban] kanban_attach writes immediately on pick; cancelling create, removing a thumb, or deleting a task never deletes files though the delete confirm claims attachments disappear.
Where: src/screens/kanban/KanbanPane.tsx:102-113
Source: audit 4 U4

tasks.title: Can't-read card's 'Open the file' doesn't open the file
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · roadmap] It lands on the Repo pane's empty viewer; the broken chronicle.json is neither opened nor selected.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:325
Source: audit 2 U1

tasks.title: One-click action buttons double-fire
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · roadmap] Nothing disables Publish/Pull/Switch/Clean-up while in flight; double-click = two git_push calls.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:331-346, src/screens/roadmap/NeedsYou.tsx:70-85
Source: audit 2 U2

tasks.title: Stale alert's Scan starts a rebuild session without confirmation
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · roadmap] The footer and warning-banner paths confirm first; Scan doesn't. Decide and make it consistent.
Where: src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:314
Source: audit 2 U3

tasks.title: The 'just-done' celebrate moment is unreachable (plus dead FxCard and dead copy-only button)
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · roadmap] mapRoadmap never emits just-done; the FxCard component and NeedsYou's copy-only-with-command button are also unmapped/unreachable.
Where: src/lib/roadmap-data.ts (status mapping), src/screens/roadmap/PhaseRail.tsx:204-235, src/screens/roadmap/NeedsYou.tsx:86-94
Source: audit 2 U4

tasks.title: 'Changed just now' emphasis lingers up to 8s
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · shell] justSwitched is computed at render with nothing re-rendering at the 2s boundary.
Where: src/App.tsx:480
Source: audit 2 U5

tasks.title: Manifest custom_actions.level is ignored — danger detection is regex-only
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · roadmap] A manifest-declared dangerous action with an innocuous command gets the plain confirm.
Where: src/lib/roadmap-data.ts:224-255, src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:349
Source: audit 2 U6

tasks.title: cmd-1-9 from inside the palette switches behind the overlay and leaves it open
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · shell] The palette rows advertise the hints but the handler doesn't close the palette.
Where: src/App.tsx:322-325
Source: audit 1 U-1

tasks.title: Re-opening an already-open project resets you to the Roadmap pane
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · shell] doOpenProject always setPane('road') even on the short-circuit; roadmap expansion state is lost on Home round-trips (no module cache like RepoPane's).
Where: src/App.tsx:166
Source: audit 1 U-2

tasks.title: A backgrounded tab with updates can't be closed by mouse
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · shell] The Updated badge replaces the hover close x; you must activate first.
Where: src/components/chrome/TitleBar.tsx:112-124
Source: audit 1 U-3

tasks.title: Enter in the new-project field bypasses the disabled Create
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · shell] Enter checks name.trim() but not invalid; the button is correctly disabled.
Where: src/overlays/NewProjectDialog.tsx:66
Source: audit 1 U-4

tasks.title: The home screen gives no clue which recents are already open
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · shell] Open and closed projects render identically; combined with the pane reset, the Home round-trip quietly punishes.
Where: src/screens/Picker.tsx / picker-data
Source: audit 1 U-5

tasks.title: cmd-L 'Focus the terminal' is advertised but doesn't exist
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · shell] The shortcuts overlay and the handoff spec both list it; no handler anywhere.
Where: src/overlays/ShortcutsOverlay.tsx:34
Source: audit 1 B-2

tasks.title: Save is enabled with zero staged files and fails with raw git jargon
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · repo] With unstaged-only changes, Save commits nothing and the banner shows raw git output; stage_all exists and is never used.
Expected: auto-include on save, or require a non-empty Ready to save.
Where: src/screens/repo/HistoryPane.tsx:472, src/screens/repo/RepoPane.tsx:419
Source: audit 3 U1

tasks.title: Closing a viewer tab leaves the tree selection on the closed file
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · repo] onCloseTab updates activeTab but not selectedId.
Where: src/screens/repo/RepoPane.tsx:494-498
Source: audit 3 U2

tasks.title: Repo-root changes group is labeled '.'
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · repo] Root-level files group under the literal key '.' — cryptic for the audience.
Expected: 'project folder' or the repo name.
Where: src/lib/repo-data.ts:170
Source: audit 3 U3

tasks.title: Empty commit log renders a bare SAVES header plus a stray graph stub
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · repo] Zero commits still draws the trunk path and shows no empty-state copy.
Expected: suppress the SVG and say 'No saves yet'.
Where: src/screens/repo/HistoryPane.tsx:103-134
Source: audit 3 U4

tasks.title: Live terminals don't re-theme on light/dark switch
tasks.content:
[P2 · UI · terminals] The xterm theme is captured once at spawn; after switching to light the terminal stays a black slab and new spawns won't match old ones.
Where: src/lib/term-sessions.ts:128-135
Source: audit 4 I1

tasks.title: Viewer tab names never truncate — long names wrap and break the strip
tasks.content:
[P2 · UI · repo] No max-w/truncate on the tab label; long filenames wrap to two lines and collide with the underline.
Where: src/screens/repo/Viewer.tsx:163-188
Source: audit 3 I1

tasks.title: Selected-row inset bar is invisible for root-level files
tasks.content:
[P2 · UI · repo] The bar sits at -left-11px and the scroll container clips it; only nested selections show it.
Where: src/screens/repo/FileTree.tsx:127,229
Source: audit 3 I2

tasks.title: '1 STEPS' — no pluralization, and '0 STEPS' sections render
tasks.content:
[P2 · UI · roadmap] Where: src/screens/roadmap/PhaseDetailHost.tsx:94
Source: audit 2 I1

tasks.title: Orphaned 'Milestones reached' label when there are no tags (plus dead wv-dash keyframes)
tasks.content:
[P2 · UI · roadmap] With tags: [] the label renders alone; the local wv-dash keyframes are unused (the arrow uses wv-arrow).
Where: src/screens/roadmap/HistoryPanel.tsx:155-165,118
Source: audit 2 I2

tasks.title: 'View full log' spawns a duplicate tail tab on every click; 'Start this phase' renders on Done phases
tasks.content:
[P3 · UX · sessions] Where: src/screens/roadmap/RoadmapPane.tsx:307-313, src/screens/roadmap/PhaseDetail.tsx:234
Source: audit 4 U5

tasks.title: 'N saves waiting' wraps to two lines in the publish footer
tasks.content:
[P3 · UI · repo] At the 340px column with both buttons even the short label wraps (deck parity: the deck wraps too).
Where: src/screens/repo/HistoryPane.tsx:258-271
Source: audit 3 I3

Ruling (round 3): deck parity — the deck's own L4 render wraps this label identically at 340px; matching it is faithful, not broken.

tasks.title: Tab-label grammar is inconsistent; dead props and states
tasks.content:
[P3 · UI · terminals] Brand starts yield 'Claude', phase starts 'claude - R-1'; onTerminalRenameStart is a dead prop; KanbanRound state 'done' is never written by the backend.
Where: src/App.tsx:468, src/screens/Shell.tsx:68, src/lib/ipc.ts:227
Source: audit 4 I3

tasks.title: Palette Enter could select the wrong project
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · shell] cmdk scatter-fuzz let a weak open-group match outrank an exact recent name (groups never re-sort). Fixed: substring-only filter. Verified against the auditor's stub.
Source: re-audit 1

tasks.title: Stale window title after closing the last project
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · shell] The last close left the project's name in the macOS title. Fixed: bare 'Chronicle' like the Home path.
Source: re-audit 1

tasks.title: Stale op-error banner survived later successes
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · repo] Only saves cleared it. Fixed: every successful git op clears the banner.
Source: re-audit 3

tasks.title: All-clear note shown while git status was unknown
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · repo] 'Everything is recorded' rendered under the failure banner. Fixed: suppressed while status is unknown.
Source: re-audit 3

tasks.title: Dead-end Copy past the 5MB cap
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · repo] The huge card offered Copy that always failed past the backend cap. Fixed: withheld, with truthful note tiers; cap state lives on the cached tab (fixes 'Open anyway' resurfacing after pane switches too).
Source: re-audit 3

tasks.title: Viewer tab strip let the active tab slide out of view
tasks.content:
[P2 · UI · repo] No overflow handling. Fixed: the strip scrolls and the active tab keeps itself visible.
Source: re-audit 3

tasks.title: Commit meta wrapped into the next row
tasks.content:
[P3 · UI · repo] Fixed: truncates on one line.
Source: re-audit 3

tasks.title: Failed fix round looped a toast per tick
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · kanban] The failure branch never refreshed, so the resume effect re-opened the flow (74 toasts measured). Fixed: refresh-first + a failure latch; bounded to one toast even against a never-settling backend.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: Backend swept archived tasks into rounds
tasks.content:
[P1 · BROKEN · kanban] fixes_generate ignored archived; invisible members held rounds open forever. Fixed: archived excluded from the pick and from round math.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: Zero-member settled rounds claimed 'underway' forever
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · kanban] Fixed: a settled round with no visible members is closed.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: Resumed generating overlay reset its clock
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · kanban] Fixed: adopts the backend's started_at like the roadmap mirror.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: Kanban dialogs didn't take focus — Escape dead until a click
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · kanban] Fixed: overlays focus on open; the composer autofocuses its title.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: Edit-mode attachment changes weren't transactional
tasks.content:
[P2 · UX · kanban] Removing detached immediately (cancel left dangling refs); adding then cancelling orphaned files. Fixed: removals commit on Save, cancel restores; added files detach on cancel.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: Silent settle when unwatched
tasks.content:
[P3 · UX · kanban] Fixed: returning to the pane after an unwatched settle lands on the done card with its toast.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: Fixes still-running card used roadmap copy
tasks.content:
[P3 · UI · sessions] Fixed: its own reassurance line.
Source: re-audit 4

tasks.title: False 'Done · just now' on open and tab switch
tasks.content:
[P2 · WRONG-INFO · roadmap] Empty-set truthiness + no per-project baseline reset. Fixed: real flips only.
Source: re-audit 2

tasks.title: Phase-detail breadcrumb wrapped at the 560px floor
tasks.content:
[P3 · UI · roadmap] Fixed: nowrap chips, truncating name.
Source: re-audit 2

tasks.title: Fixes >5min card had no View full log
tasks.content:
[P3 · UX · sessions] Fixed: fixes_log_path seam + deduped 'Fix plan log' tail tab.
Source: re-audit 2

tasks.title: Warning banner stacked with the fixes-mirror card
tasks.content:
[P3 · UX · roadmap] Fixed: yields like it does for rebuilds.
Source: re-audit 2

tasks.title: Doc chips keyed by basename could collide
tasks.content:
[P3 · UI · roadmap] Fixed: unique keys.
Source: re-audit 2

tasks.title: B1 · Phantom round on double-click — guard now runs before any store mutation; settle targets the newest generating round
B2 · Board-wipe hazards — atomic temp+rename writes; corrupt kanban.json errors instead of being replaced
B3 · Attachment paths resolve against the manifest dir, not the repo root
H1 · Agent sessions spawn as their own process group; cancel kills the whole group (no orphaned grandchildren)
H3 · kanban_detach refuses symlinks and dotted paths
H5 · git_checkout rejects flag-shaped branch names
H6 · PTY sessions register before the reader thread can observe an exit
H7 · Round tasks travel via .chronicle/round_N_tasks.json, not argv (ARG_MAX)
D1 · init_status/init_cancel gate on the opened-roots allowlist
D3 · agent_paths cached — no login-shell spawn under the runs lock
D5 · file_matches on a >5MB file reads as unknown
D6 · A multi-key condition is unknown, matching the validator
D7 · Timestamps from SystemTime/libc, not a spawned date(1)
BUG-1/2/5 · Panes remount per project (key={dir}) — no cross-project state bleed
BUG-3 · Roadmap 3s ticks guard late replies; onPollNow behind a ref so the interval survives renders
BUG-4 · A stale 'Writing your roadmap…' picker flag is verified against the backend and released
BUG-6 · Viewer loaders refuse to commit a body over a switched mode
H-1 · closeProject evicts the repo tree/tab cache and kanban store + thumbnails
H-2 · Failed thumbnails are remembered and retried after 30s
H-3 · Created task ids mint from the store the mutation applies to (no duplicate ids)
H-4 · pollOne in-flight guard; log graph normalizes before length and respects the seq
H-6 · Only running === true reads as running in the fixes poll
H-7 · copy_file typed as the string it returns
H-8 · Code/diff renders cap at 5k/2k rows with an honest truncation note
H-9 · The viewer scrolls a tab into view only when it changes
B2-FE · mutateKanban persists against fresh disk truth — never clobbers the executor's column moves
DEBT · Typed InitStatusData; one IMG_MIME; banner cast → satisfies variants; Show more hides at the 200 cap; steps key by index
UX-1 · Publish footer: Chronicle publishes for you — no gh jargon
UX-2 · Start this phase is idempotent — foregrounds the live session instead of twinning it
UX-3 · Prompt copies say what to do: 'When Claude is ready, paste it (⌘V) as the first message'
UX-4 · One name for rebuild: Scan button says Rebuild; card says 'Rebuilding your roadmap…'; confirms share 'Not yet'
UX-5 · Round strip tells the truth: 'being planned' / 'waiting to run'; frozen cards say 'locked until the round finishes'
UX-6 · The round-done card gains Start the round (terminal + agent + prompt on the clipboard)
UX-7 · The current-state banner gains 'Open the phase ›'
UX-8 · Publish failures translate to recovery sentences (behind remote · auth · offline)
UX-9 · Viewer segment says Changes, and a staged file reads 'Ready to save'
UX-10 · The basic-view card explains it was chosen
UX-11 · Raw ENOENT/EACCES errors read as plain sentences
UX-12 · Shortcuts overlay merges duplicate pane rows (⌘J or ⌃tab) and teaches double-click rename
UX-13 · Picker cards show a 'Session running' badge for live terminals
UI-1 · Buttons ride one size scale (sm 28 · md 33 · lg 36); h-[Npx] overrides removed
UI-2 · Agent brand marks are monochrome at rest, hue on hover
UI-3 · IdChip never wraps or shrinks
UI-4 · History ref chips + author tiles join the micro-chip scale (10.5/r-5 · size-4/8px)
UI-5 · mini-md renders fenced code blocks and blockquotes
UI-6 · Rail icons on the radius scale (8)
UI-7 · Current-state headline 17→15px
UI-8 · Light --text-dimmer darkened a step
UI-9 · Ago stamps cap at 8 weeks, then show a date
UI-10 · Palette status word never wraps
UI-11 · No twin toast when the round-done card shows
UI-12 · Ended terminals hide the cursor; the tab drops italic
UI-13 · Keyboard focus rings snap instead of fading
UI-14 · Disabled primary buttons read as a quiet filled state
UI-15 · The warning-banner action is de-pilled to the radius scale
